subject: A Review of Set Theory
question: An experiment consists of the following two stages: (1) a fair coin is tossed (2) if the coin shows a head, then a fair die is rolled; otherwise, the coin is flipped again. An outcome of this experiment is a pair of the form (outcome from stage 1, outcome from stage 2). Let S be the collection of all outcomes. List the elements of S and then find the cardinality of S.
